refactor_notes: Two concrete improvements against the rubric. (1) Design token / IA violation: the bug-not-found branch renders a div with inline styles (style='text-align:center;padding:32px;' etc.) instead of the design system empty-state component; design-guide.md §Components §Empty state specifies 'full-width card, center-aligned, navy-400 icon (48px), navy-600 heading (text-lg), navy-500 description (text-base, space-2 margin)' using the .card class -- the card class, correct color tokens, and empty-state copy ('No bugs filed yet' pattern) must replace the ad-hoc inline markup. (2) HTTP semantics: the not-found branch returns status_code=200 instead of 404; design-guide.md §Design Philosophy ('Explicit states, never silent') implies correct status signalling, and architecture.md §Decisions notes the API should follow HTTP conventions (201/redirect on creation); the same principle applies to 404 for missing resources. The layer boundary concern (db.query inline in the route handler vs BugRepository per architecture.md §Pattern Proposals AC4 row) was already raised in the AC3 verdict and remains pending from that refactor.
